policy.reviewReadyDecision: Manual gates may remain deferred when the repository claim is limited to public review readiness and the gate is clearly documented as not yet evidenced.
policy.releaseClaimDecision: A manual gate blocks any release, production, runtime, hardware, wallet, network scale, or hosted CI claim that depends on that gate until evidence is recorded for the exact commit.
forbiddenSubstituteEvidence: private logs that cannot be reviewed
unredacted secrets, wallet keys, server addresses, or raw production logs

gates.deferWhen: A credential with workflow scope is unavailable and local equivalent commands are documented.
gates.blocksWhen: A repository claims hosted CI coverage for the reviewed commit.
gates.evidence: Published workflow file and hosted run for the reviewed commit, or explicit deferred wording.

gates.releaseClaim: Executable on-chain behavior beyond unit tests
gates.deferWhen: The release does not claim local-validator, devnet, or BPF artifact readiness.
gates.blocksWhen: Program, SDK, PDA, account layout, instruction, or chain-facing behavior is claimed as release-ready.
gates.evidence: BPF build output plus local-validator or devnet transaction logs tied to the commit.

gates.releaseClaim: Visual correctness beyond smoke-tested route rendering
gates.deferWhen: The release only claims built route smoke coverage.
gates.blocksWhen: A browser route, layout, visual asset, localization, or screenshot quality claim is release-critical.
gates.evidence: Desktop and mobile screenshots tied to commit and viewport dimensions.

gates.releaseClaim: Real wallet extension, mobile deep-link, network switching, or transaction signing behavior
gates.deferWhen: The release only claims no-wallet and mock-provider UI coverage.
gates.blocksWhen: A release claim depends on real Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, mobile wallet, network switching, or signing behavior.
gates.evidence: Wallet version, browser/device, network, approval artifacts, transaction signature when applicable, and redacted logs.

gates.releaseClaim: Fourier Pickaxe runtime visual quality, GPU proof-search speed, or screenshot evidence
gates.deferWhen: The release only claims documentation-first review coverage.
gates.blocksWhen: A review or release claims GPU rendering quality, performance, proof-search throughput, or visual fidelity.
gates.evidence: GPU model, browser version, fixture source, screenshots, proof-search duration, and responsiveness notes.

gates.releaseClaim: Networked Guardian scale, slow-client backpressure, or production host capacity
gates.deferWhen: The release only claims deterministic local Guardian core-load coverage.
gates.blocksWhen: A release claim depends on networked scale, adverse-client handling, production sizing, or operational capacity.
gates.evidence: Soak profile, client count, message rate, host profile, backpressure behavior, failure summary, and rollback notes.
